name: IdsEdwCchgRplcMultCatGrpDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH MAIN AS (SELECT CMCG.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SK AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, CMCG.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CMCG.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_1_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_1_SK, CMCG.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_2_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_2_SK, CMCG.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_3_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_3_SK, CMCG.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_4_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_4_SK, CMCG.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_5_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_5_SK, CMCG.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_6_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_6_SK, CMCG.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_7_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_7_SK, CMCG.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_8_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_8_SK, CMCG.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_RPLC_9_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_9_SK, CMCG.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, CMCG.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, CMCG.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CMCG.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CMCG.VRSN_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC AS CMCG LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS CD1 ON CMCG.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE CMCG.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} AND CMCG.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SK NOT IN (0, 1)), NA_ROW AS (SELECT 1 AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, 'NA' AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_1_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_2_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_3_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_4_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_5_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_6_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_7_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_8_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_9_SK, 1 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, 'NA' AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, 'NA' AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 'NA' AS VRSN_ID), UNK_ROW AS (SELECT 0 AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, 'UNK' AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_1_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_2_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_3_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_4_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_5_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_6_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_7_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_8_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_9_SK, 0 AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, 'UNK' AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, 'UNK' AS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, 0 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 0 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 0 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 'UNK' AS VRSN_ID) SELECT * FROM MAIN UNION ALL SELECT * FROM NA_ROW UNION ALL SELECT * FROM UNK_ROW
